sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: This report presents the implementation, deployment, and documentation of the project.

sections.title: System Overview
sections.content: The system is composed of a client, server, and SQLite-backed data layer.

sections.title: Implementation Details
sections.content: The API was built using Python and follows a modular architecture.

sections.title: Testing and Validation
sections.content: Testing was carried out using manual endpoint checks and structured validation.

sections.title: Reflection
sections.content: The project demonstrates practical integration of API design, documentation, and reporting.

genai.declaration: Generative AI tools were used to assist with drafting, restructuring, and refining technical explanations. All generated content was reviewed and edited by the author before submission.
genai.analysis: AI assistance was mainly used for editing, formatting, and code explanation rather than for producing final unverified technical claims.

conversation_logs.title: Session 1
conversation_logs.content: Discussed API structure, repository organisation, and reporting format.

conversation_logs.title: Session 2
conversation_logs.content: Refined database handling, JSON structure, and LaTeX generation workflow.
